title: AnalysisResult
description: Policy engine output containing a trade decision with confidence, price targets, and execution eligibility gates for a given AnalysisRequest.

analysis_result_id.description: Unique identifier for this analysis result, assigned by the policy engine.

request_id.description: The request_id of the AnalysisRequest that triggered this result.

decision.description: The trade decision produced by the policy engine.

confidence.description: Model confidence score for this decision, normalized 0-1.

position_size_pct.description: Recommended position size as a percentage of portfolio (0-100).

reasoning.description: Human-readable or machine-parsable reasoning for the decision.

model_signature.description: Identifier for the model and version that produced this result, e.g. 'swing_v1@abc123'.

analysis_timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the analysis was completed.

execution_eligibility.description: Gate results indicating whether the decision is eligible for live or paper execution.

confidence_gate.description: Confidence score meets the minimum threshold for this mode.

risk_gate.description: Risk checks (position size, exposure) are satisfied.

regime_gate.description: Market regime is compatible with the decision direction.

cost_gate.description: Estimated costs (fee + slippage) do not consume expected edge.

overall_eligible.description: True if all individual gates passed; the decision is eligible for execution.

gate_details.description: Optional per-gate detail with scores and thresholds.

mode.description: The trading mode under which this result was produced.
